title: shengbenhao Cutting Discs for Dremel, Cutting Wheels Set for Rotary Tool Accessories with1/8" Shank, HSS Circular Saw Blades, Diamond Resin Cutting Wheels For Wood Metal Plastic Glass Stone DIY Craft
features: ★GREAT TOOL FOR DIY - These cutting wheels come with 1/8inch shank are compatible with most rotary tools as good as original. We have useed original brand rotary tools to test this accessory kit. Highly recommended for crafts, hobby, professional, home repair, model making.

★6 Pcs HSS CIRCULAR SAW BLADES - These cut off saw blades made of high speed steel and there are 6 kinds of outer diameters 22/25/32/35/44/50mm. They are suitable for cutting wood, plastic products, aluminum alloy, soft metal, etc.

★10 Pcs DIAMOND CUTTING WHEELS - The cutting wheels are made of high quality diamond. With high cutting efficiency, high durability, stable quality, etc., they are suitable for cutting stone, rock, gem, jade and glass.

★10 Pcs RESIN CUT OFF DISCS - With low heat generation and thin cutting line, the cut off wheels are applicable to electric drills, hanging grinders, electric grinders, etc. They can be used to cut metal, plastic, chassis modification, thin metal circuit board and DIY production after connected with mandrels, and are ideal for olive cutting.

★★★ QUALITY WARRENTY – We provides 3 months quality guarantee and lifetime after-sale service for every customer. We believe in our cutting wheels for rotary tool and we value our reputation as a expert. If YOU have any problems, please feel free to contact our customer services team, solutions would be within 24hours. Thank you for your business.
description: Product Description Cutting disc set, multifunction circular saw blades suitable for cutting wood, metal, plastic, stone, glass, ceramic, jade and more. These cutting tool set is suitable for everyone, whether you are a professional craftsman or diy hobbyist. 6 x HSS circular saw blades Outer diameter 22/25/32/35/44/50 mm Inner diameter 6.35 mm 2 x mandrels (3.175 mm and 6 mm) 2.Made of high speed steel Sharp, tough and durable. High precision and smooth cutting surface. High speed steel saw blades are suitable for cutting wood, plastic, PVC pipe, aluminum alloy, soft metal, etc 10Pcs Diamond cutting disc Diameter: 22 mm 2 x mandrels（3mm) Thin and sharp Diamond cutting wheels are completely coated with fine diamond particles, breathing holes is for reducing heat and removing debris, perfect for making slots and slits. Designed to last long and not lose its shape or break, it provides smooth fine cuts. Ideal for cutting hard materials including marble, concrete, brick, porcelain, ceramic, epoxy and hardwoods. Not recommended for metal. 10Pcs resin Cutting-off Disc Outer diameter: 32 mm Thickness: 1 mm 2x mandrels (3 mm) Reinforced with fibreglass for increased durability and a longer service life. Ideal for cutting, grooving and trimming all types of metal. Can also be used on other materials including thin wood, plastic and ceramic. Reinforced with fiberglass to provide increased durability and longer life. Cutting wheels make it easy to cut screws or screws or slots in rusted or stripped bolts and screws to remove it with the screwdriver. Warm Tips For Usage Protection must be done. Please note that the mandrels must be fully inserted to avoid bending at high speed. Please use the Spanner to tighten when using and DO NOT tighten the chuck too strong to lock the spindle. At the same time, as far as possible use small diameter saw blade and low speed under the situation of meeting the usage requirements. Speed must not exceed 20,000 RPM. In the selection of saw blade, the smaller your electric mill, choosing a smaller saw blade will be much stabler.
